sections.subject: Literature

entries.title:
This course includeds the following topic(s): Fairy Tales, Tall Tales/ Fables, Community Read Alouds: Grades 1-12

About Fairy Tales
As students begin their adventures with books, we stir their imaginations with fairy tales from around the world.

About Tall Tales/ Fables
Along with fairy tales from around the world, this course introduces students to Aesop's famous fables and classic American or Canadian tall tales.

About Community Read Alouds: Grades 1-12
This is meant to be a read-aloud for all ages to enjoy together in the afternoon at least 1 time a week. We encourage you to choose a book that is specific to your region. However, we will offer some suggestions in the Grades 1-3 Literature lessons and Grades 4+ Citizenship lessons. The suggested book titles will be available June 1st in the lesson plans.

entries.content:
Fairy Tales
Suitable for hungry kindergarteners as well.

Tall Tales/ Fables
Easily combined with hungry Kindergarteners or Grade 2 students.
